scripts.build:cf: next build && opennextjs-cloudflare build --skipNextBuild && cp .open-next/worker.js .open-next/assets/_worker.js && cp -r .open-next/cloudflare .open-next/assets/ && cp -r .open-next/server-functions .open-next/assets/ && cp -r .open-next/middleware .open-next/assets/ && cp -r .open-next/.build .open-next/assets/ && node -e "const r={version:1,include:['/*'],exclude:['/_next/static/*','/_next/image*','/favicon.ico']};require('fs').writeFileSync('.open-next/assets/_routes.json',JSON.stringify(r))"
scripts.deploy: npm run build:cf && wrangler pages deploy .open-next/assets --project-name eral --branch main
